checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~2 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 5 JSON-LD blocks: Organization, WebSite, Organization, WebPage, VideoObject
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 258 divs with only 23 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 96/212 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 1/2 inputs have names, 2/2 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
9 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
1 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 176/186 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: OPTIONS, POST, HEAD, GET

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~135,295 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 21 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.17–$2.03 per load ($0.85–$10.15 for a 5-page session)
162 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, main, navigation
All 43 images have alt attributes (43 descriptive, 0 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
1 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
17 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 335ms
Moderate payload: 529KB
No redirects — direct access
Resource heavy: 7 stylesheets
Compression enabled: gzip
